pokemon:murkrow.name: Murkrow
pokemon:murkrow.summary: Murkrow was feared and loathed as the alleged bearer of ill fortune. This Pokémon shows strong interest in anything that sparkles or glitters. It will even try to steal rings from women.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Murkrow was feared and loathed as the alleged bearer of ill fortune. This Pokémon shows strong interest in anything that sparkles or glitters. It will even try to steal rings from women.
If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it, then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.
If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.
It hides any shiny object it finds in a secret location. MURKROW and MEOWTH loot one another's stashes.
It is believed that seeing this Pokémon at night will bring about ominous occurrences.
MURKROW were feared as the alleged bearers of ill fortune. It shows strong interest in anything that sparkles. It will even try to steal rings from women.
It is said that when chased, it lures its attacker onto dark mountain trails where the foe will get lost.
Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.
Widely shunned as a bearer of ill fortune. Upon crossing paths with this creature, I've been told one must chant ”Workrum, Workrum—bad luck, don't come” as a protective incantation.
Seen as a symbol of bad luck, it’s generally disliked. Yet it gives presents—objects that sparkle or shine—to Trainers it’s close to.
Murkrow was feared and loathed as the alleged bearer of ill fortune. This Pokémon shows strong interest in anything that sparkles or glitters. It will even try to steal rings from women.
It appears near travelers to lure them into deep forests. It is said to carry misfortune.
If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it, then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.
MURKROW was feared and loathed as the alleged bearer of ill fortune. This POKéMON shows strong interest in anything that sparkles or glitters. It will even try to steal rings from women.
MURKROW was feared and loathed as the alleged bearer of ill fortune. This POKéMON shows strong interest in anything that sparkles or glitters. It will even try to steal rings from women.
It is said that when chased, it lures its attacker onto dark mountain trails where the foe will get lost.
It is said that when chased, it lures its attacker onto dark mountain trails where the foe will get lost.
They awaken at dusk and take wing in the twilight, leading to the expression, “Get home before the Murkrow fly.”
It searches for shiny things for its boss. Murkrow’s presence is said to be unlucky, so many people detest it.
It has a weakness for shiny things. It’s been known to sneak into the nests of Gabite—noted collectors of jewels—in search of treasure.
If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it, then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.
If spotted, it will lure an unwary person into chasing it then lose the pursuer on mountain trails.
It hides any shiny object it finds in a secret location. Murkrow and Meowth loot one another’s stashes.
Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Murkrow was feared and loathed as the alleged bearer of ill fortune. This Pokémon shows strong interest in anything that sparkles or glitters. It will even try to steal rings from women.

pokemon:honchkrow.name: Honchkrow
pokemon:honchkrow.summary: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous Murkrow in tow.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous Murkrow in tow.
If one utters a deep cry, many Murkrow gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
If one utters a deep cry, many Murkrow gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous MURKROW in tow.
It is merciless by nature. It is said that it never forgives the mistakes of its MURKROW followers.
One cry from this Pokémon, and a murder of Murkrow come flying. At such times, one would think the curtain of night had fallen, plunging the world into jet-black darkness.
If its Murkrow cronies fail to catch food for it, or if it feels they have betrayed it, it will hunt them down wherever they are and punish them.
If one utters a deep cry, many Murkrow gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
It makes its MURKROW cronies bring it food. It idles its time away, grooming itself in its nest.
If one utters a deep cry, many MURKROW gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
It is merciless by nature. It is said that it never forgives the mistakes of its MURKROW followers.
A single cry from this nocturnal Pokémon, and more than a hundred of its Murkrow cronies will assemble.
Its goons take care of most of the fighting for it. The only time it dirties its own hands is in delivering a final blow to finish off an opponent.
It will absolutely not forgive failure from or betrayal by its goons. It has no choice in this if it wants to maintain the order of the flock.
If one utters a deep cry, many Murkrow gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
If one utters a deep cry, many Murkrow gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
If one utters a deep cry, many Murkrow gather quickly. For this, it is called “Summoner of Night.”
Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous Murkrow in tow.
